---
title: "alfred_observer.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/core/engine/alfred_observer.py"
loc: 20
complexity: 6
logic_score: 7.60
style_score: 3.36
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.94
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating AlfredOverwatch, analyze_failure. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.4/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 16 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [time](file://time)

### Exports
- `AlfredOverwatch`
- `analyze_failure`
- `write_suggestion`
